notFound.heading: Página no encontrada
notFound.description: La página que estás buscando no existe o fue movida.

forbidden.heading: Acceso denegado
forbidden.description: No tienes permisos para acceder a esta página. Contacta a un administrador si crees que esto es un error.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

forbidden.heading: Access denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to view this page. Contact an administrator if you think this is a mistake.
